# DjVu Fixture Sets

This document describes the fixture sets generated by [generate_djvu_fixtures.py](generate_djvu_fixtures.py).

Dependencies:
- DjVu creation tools in `DEE5_BIN` or the default location `~/Soft/DEE5/bin`
- Validation helper `djvudump.exe` in `DJVULIBRE_BIN` or the default repo build output `windows/build/Release/x64`

Output directories:
- reference set: `tests/fixtures/reference/`

Additional fixture sources:
- Files with the `real_` prefix are taken from the original DjVuLibre repository and are not generated by this script.

## Legacy Baseline Set

Directory: `tests/fixtures/reference/`

### `sp_bg_only.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: solid background `#E6F0FF`
- Visible text: none
- Hidden text: none
- Links: none
- Format: bundled

### `sp_bg_fgtext.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background `#E6F0FF` plus visible text
- Visible text: `VISIBLE_TEXT_PAGE1_123`
- Hidden text: none
- Links: none
- Format: bundled

### `sp_bg_fgtext_hidden.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background `#E6F0FF` plus visible text
- Visible text: `VISIBLE_TEXT_PAGE1_123`
- Hidden text: `HIDDEN_TEXT_PAGE1_ABC`
- Links: none
- Format: bundled

### `sp_bg_fgtext_hidden_links.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background `#E6F0FF` plus visible text
- Visible text: `VISIBLE_TEXT_PAGE1_123`
- Hidden text: `HIDDEN_TEXT_PAGE1_ABC`
- Links:
  - external: `https://example.com/`
  - internal self-link
- Format: bundled

### `mp2_bundled.djvu`
- Pages: `2`
- Format: bundled
- Page 1: background `#E6F0FF`, visible text present, hidden text present
- Page 2: background `#FFF3E0`, visible text `VISIBLE_TEXT_PAGE2_456`
- Links: internal link `1 -> 2`

### `mp2_indirect/index.djvu`
- Pages: `2`
- Format: indirect
- Content: same logical content as `mp2_bundled.djvu`
- Files: `index.djvu`, `mp2_page1.djvu`, `mp2_page2.djvu`

### `sp_unicode_hidden.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background `#E6F0FF` plus visible text
- Visible text: `VISIBLE_TEXT_PAGE1_123`
- Hidden text: `Привіт DjVu тест 123`
- Links: none
- Format: bundled

### `sp_bg_only_large.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: solid background `#E6F0FF`
- Size: `2000x1500`
- Visible text: none
- Hidden text: none
- Links: none
- Format: bundled

## Reference Set

Directory: `tests/fixtures/reference/`

### `sp_anno_only_links.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: solid light background, no visible text
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: yes
- Links: external `https://example.com/ref?x=1#top` and internal self-link
- Expected: `contains_anno=true`, `contains_text=false`

### `sp_hidden_only_no_visible.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: solid background, no visible text
- Hidden text: `HIDDEN_ONLY_TEXT_123`
- Annotations: none
- Expected: `contains_text=true`, OCR text extractable, `contains_anno=false`

### `sp_rotation_90.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background plus visible marker text `ROTATION_MARKER`
- Rotation: `90`
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: stable open/decode/render for 90-degree rotation

### `sp_rotation_180.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background plus visible marker text `ROTATION_MARKER`
- Rotation: `180`
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: stable open/decode/render for 180-degree rotation

### `sp_rotation_270.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: background plus visible marker text `ROTATION_MARKER`
- Rotation: `270`
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: stable open/decode/render for 270-degree rotation

### `sp_palette_indexed_bg.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: indexed/palette background, 16 colors
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: correct decode/render with indexed source imagery

### `sp_bw_mask_heavy.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visual content: simple background with dense black glyph and shape pattern
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: mask-heavy decode/render path works without artifacts

### `mp3_bundled_mixed_layers.djvu`
- Pages: `3`
- Format: bundled
- Page 1: background only
- Page 2: background plus visible text
- Page 3: background plus visible text plus hidden text plus links
- Page 3 links: internal `page 3 -> page 1`, external `https://example.com/p3?src=djvu`
- Expected: `pages_num=3` with mixed `contains_text` and `contains_anno` states across pages

### `mp3_indirect_mixed_layers/index.djvu`
- Pages: `3`
- Format: indirect
- Content: same logical content as `mp3_bundled_mixed_layers.djvu`
- Expected: page/id/url mapping works and per-page text/annotation access works

### `mp2_bundled_shared_resources.djvu`
- Pages: `2`
- Format: bundled
- Visual content: two different pages built with shared glyph resources
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: none
- Expected: both pages open correctly, shared resource handling is stable, size/text/anno APIs stay consistent

### `sp_utf8_multilang_hidden.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visible text: `ASCII_MARKER`
- Hidden text: `Привіт DjVu δοκιμή 日本語 test 123`
- Annotations: none
- Expected: `contains_text=true`, UTF-8 hidden text extractable without corruption

### `sp_links_edgecases.djvu`
- Pages: `1`
- Visible text: `ASCII_MARKER`
- Hidden text: none
- Annotations: yes
- Links:
  - `https://example.com/a%20b?q=1&x=%2F#frag`
  - `mailto:test@example.com?subject=DjVu%20Test`
  - internal self-link
- Expected: stable annotation parsing and URL extraction
